title: leucas oligocephala subsp. bowalensis
intro: Leucas oligocephala subsp. bowalensis, also known as Bowalensis, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. In terms of herbal preparations, Bowalensis can be consumed as a decoction, made by boiling the plant in water, or used in the form of a paste or powder, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
